parameters.content:
## Inbound Webhook (All TextBee Events)

Triggered by TextBee on every SMS event.

**What it does:**
- Verifies HMAC-SHA256 signature on every request
- Routes on event type:
  - **MESSAGE_DELIVERED / MESSAGE_SENT** → overwrites PENDING with confirmed timestamp
  - **MESSAGE_FAILED** → clears PENDING so lead is re-eligible; logs error to Notes
  - **MESSAGE_RECEIVED** → updates reply columns (M–P + S), logs to Conversations tab

**Why it exists:**
Event-driven state management — the sheet reflects confirmed delivery, not just send attempts.

values.content:
=You are classifying SMS replies from NZ real estate agents responding to a cold outreach about AI automation services.

Classify the reply into exactly one of these statuses:
- "Interested" — Open to a chat, wants to book a call/meeting, affirmative, asking to set up a time
- "Not Interested" — Clear rejection: no thanks, not for me, not interested, all good, etc.
- "Opted Out" — Explicit stop request (stop, unsubscribe, remove me) OR they have retired from real estate OR they have permanently left the industry
- "Question" — Asking for more info about the service, who Brandon is, which company, pricing, demo, etc.
- "Call Back Later" — Timing deflection: busy today, in a meeting, try me next week, contact me later — not a hard no
- "Wrong Role" — In the industry but not a sales agent (property manager, mortgage broker, admin, different department)
- "Other" — Genuinely ambiguous or unclear intent

Respond with ONLY valid JSON: {"status": "Interested"}

parameters.subject: =🔥 HOT LEAD: {{ $('Match & Prepare Inbound').item.json['Name'] }} from {{ $('Match & Prepare Inbound').item.json['Agency'] }} replied interested!
parameters.message:
=

🔥 HOT LEAD REPLY

A lead replied interested — CALL THEM NOW

Name{{ $('Match & Prepare Inbound').item.json['Name'] }}
Agency{{ $('Match & Prepare Inbound').item.json['Agency'] }}
City{{ $('Match & Prepare Inbound').item.json['City'] }}
Mobile{{ $('Match & Prepare Inbound').item.json['Mobile'] }}

Their reply

{{ $('Match & Prepare Inbound').item.json['message_text'] }}

Suggested follow-up text

Hey [name], great to hear! I'd love to show you how it works — are you free for a 15-min call this week? - Brandon

parameters.subject: =❓ {{ $('Match & Prepare Inbound').item.json['Name'] }} from {{ $('Match & Prepare Inbound').item.json['Agency'] }} has a question
parameters.message:

❓ LEAD HAS A QUESTION

Reply ASAP while the conversation is warm

Agency{{ $('Match & Prepare Inbound').item.json['Agency'] }}
City{{ $('Match & Prepare Inbound').item.json['City'] }}
Mobile{{ $('Match & Prepare Inbound').item.json['Mobile'] }}

Their question

{{ $('Match & Prepare Inbound').item.json['message_text'] }}

parameters.subject: =⏰ {{ $('Match & Prepare Inbound').item.json['Name'] }} from {{ $('Match & Prepare Inbound').item.json['Agency'] }} asked to call back
parameters.message:
=

⏰ ASKED TO CALL BACK

Not a no — follow up soon

Name{{ $('Match & Prepare Inbound').item.json['Name'] }}
Agency{{ $('Match & Prepare Inbound').item.json['Agency'] }}
City{{ $('Match & Prepare Inbound').item.json['City'] }}
Mobile{{ $('Match & Prepare Inbound').item.json['Mobile'] }}

Their message

{{ $('Match & Prepare Inbound').item.json['message_text'] }}
